sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19446" key="baru/misqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰρύ-μισθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n19446.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">largely paid, grasping,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
